comments.body:
Hello Ryan Moore,

Thank you for your reply.

We do have an option to select the **reason for export** for forward shipments; however, currently there is no option to select a **reason for return**. To help us understand your requirement better, could you please share how you are handling this on the DHL Express website?

When creating a return label on DHL Express, do you see an option to select the **reason for return**? If so, could you please share a screenshot of that option? Additionally, it would be helpful if you could share the list of options that appear under **reason for return**.

Looking forward to hearing back from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Ryan,

Apologies for the confusion.

As shown in the DHL Express portal, the **Reason for Export** option applies to both forward and return shipments. You can update this option by navigating to **App → Settings → Carrier → DHL Express → Other Details**, where you can select the preferred **Reason for Export**.

Since you would like to use a different reason for export for return shipments, please select the preferred option before generating the return label.

For example, if the **Reason for Export** is currently set to **Sale** and you generate a forward label, but you would like the return label to have a different reason such as **Return for Repair**, please update the option first and then generate the return label.

Kindly try these steps and generate the return label again to check if it works as expected.

Please feel free to reach out if you need any further assistance. We will be happy to help.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/HAuRqOPu77fgPKS5T8k8FEG0g/?name=image.png)

comments.body:
Hello Ryan,

Thank you for your reply.

At present, the **Reason for Export** can only be configured under **Account Settings**, and this setting applies to both **forward and return labels**. There is no option to select or modify the reason for export during label generation.

As a workaround, you can **update the Reason for Export in the account settings before generating either the forward or return label**, depending on your requirement.

If this feature is enhanced in the future to allow selection during label generation, we will certainly keep you informed.

We appreciate your understanding.

Please feel free to reach out to us anytime if you need any further assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

Need assistance from Team (Sibi / Keerthi)

Case: Easy option for selecting the reason for return

Details:
This is an MCSL customer from the UK using DHL Express to generate both forward and return labels.

Under Carrier Settings -> Other Details, there is an option to set the Reason for Export, which includes options such as _Sale, Gift, Sample, Return for Repair, Return to Origin_, etc. The selected option apply for both forward and return labels

The customer’s requirement is as follows:

- For forward labels, they want the Reason for Export to be set as “Sale.”
- For return labels, they want the Reason for Export to be set as “Return for Repair.”
Using these specific options helps the customer avoid paying duties or additional charges.

Currently, in the app, the Reason for Export can only be updated under Account Settings, and there is no separate option to define it for forward and return shipments. Because of this limitation, the only available workaround for the customer is to manually update the Reason for Export in Account Settings before generating each type of label.

However, this approach will not work for them because multiple employees use the app to generate labels, and changing the account-level setting frequently could affect other shipments.

The customer mentioned that on the DHL website, they are able to select the Reason for Export separately while generating forward or return labels. (screenshot attached)

They are asking if it is possible to set different reasons for export for forward and return labels, or if there is any alternative solution that would work better than updating the option in Account Settings each time before generating labels.

Could you please advise on how we should proceed in this case?
